name: Maveron
notes: Consumer-focused VC firm co-founded by Dan Levitan and Howard Schultz in 1998. HQ in Seattle, WA; also has offices in San Francisco and New York.

name: Littleplace
notes: Little Place Labs — satellite AI/ML edge computing software (OrbitfyPREP, OrbitfyEDGE, OrbitfyVIEW). Registered in London, UK; also has a Houston TX address on PitchBook but primary registered entity is UK. Treating as foreign given UK registration.

name: Woodwidear
notes: Wood Wide AI — ML infrastructure for numeric reasoning and decision intelligence. Pittsburgh startup founded ~2025, backed by Innovation Works.

name: Talentpluto
notes: AI-powered autonomous recruiting platform connecting tech sales talent with startups. Address listed as 6219 Steinway Drive, Jamesville, NY 13078. Jobs also posted in New York, NY.

name: Payu
notes: PayU — global online payment solutions provider headquartered in Amsterdam, Netherlands (Gustav Mahlerplein 5). Founded 2002. Not a US company.

name: Arx
notes: Arx City — real estate underwriting and market intelligence SaaS for developers, investors, and agents. Founded 2020, based in Kirkland, WA.

name: Workwithpathway
notes: Website shows an AI procurement platform for restaurants ('Patty' — The Restaurant AI). No HQ location found on website or in search results. Industry inferred from product description (restaurant procurement SaaS). Distinct from 'Pathway Staffing' found in search results.

name: Betaworks
notes: Betaworks — NYC-based startup studio and seed-stage VC founded in 2007 by John Borthwick.

name: Refiprocity
notes: ReFiProcity — RFP management/procurement platform ('run every RFP like a pro', claims up to 25% cost avoidance and 70% RFP time reduction). Website returned ECONNREFUSED; no HQ location found in any public database. Industry inferred from product description.

name: Wildestai
notes: Wildest AI — traceability and understanding layer for AI-native software development (VS Code extension, DiffGraph CLI). No HQ location found in any public source.

name: Savagex
notes: Savage X Fenty — Rihanna's lingerie brand. HQ at 800 Apollo Street, El Segundo, CA.

name: Lfgoenergy
notes: LF*GO! (now rebranded as Wip) — caffeine energy pouches, nicotine-free alternative to energy drinks. Press release issued from New York. Domain lfgoenergy.com now redirects to wip.com.
